text: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributors/contrib-additional.html http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributors/index.html Both list "Ernst Winter" which address was already obsolete. Fix: Delete "Ernst Winter" Please Insert "Ernst Winter" Deceased (BTW that berklix URL has a contact list for his BSD & other friends) To satisfy @freebsd.org this is no spoof: See CC line includes who runs Ernst's DNS etc.
